gates.name: Hard Reliability Gate
gates.evidence: 0 hard subsets are official gate eligible (>=50 hard episodes)
gates.next_fix: Collect more hard episodes; do not gate on one-episode wins.

gates.name: Pedestrian / Drone Horizon Gate
gates.next_fix: Prepare SDD/full OpenTraj/long AerialMPT with legal access.

gates.name: Gated Residual Gate
gates.evidence: gated residual beats strongest baseline by >=5% on 1 dataset target horizons
gates.next_fix: Improve baseline failure detection and residual training.

gates.name: Hard Interaction Gate
gates.evidence: gated residual beats strongest baseline by >=10% on 0 official hard subsets
gates.next_fix: Need reliable hard subsets and stronger interaction model.

gates.name: Alpha Calibration Gate
gates.next_fix: Alpha should rise when baseline likely fails and stay low on easy segments.

gates.name: Interaction Encoder Gate
gates.next_fix: Graph interaction must beat no-interaction on hard subsets.

gates.name: Verified Long-Horizon Gate
gates.evidence: 0 verified t+100 sources beat strongest baseline by >=5%
gates.next_fix: Need at least one robust long-horizon win.

gates.name: Physical Validity Gate
gates.next_fix: Bound residual and add validity losses.

gates.name: Stage 5C Readiness Gate
gates.evidence: Do not enter Stage 5C. Deterministic gated interaction model is not strong enough.
